search.query: `sandfly_search_sshkeys` event_type=ssh_user_details | dedup ssh_user_details.username | table ssh_user_details.username ssh_user_details.keys_current ssh_user_details.keys_total ssh_user_details.hosts_current ssh_user_details.hosts_total ssh_user_details.first_seen ssh_user_details.last_seen ssh_user_details.has_duplicate_keys | sort ssh_user_details.username | rename ssh_user_details.has_duplicate_keys as "Duplicate Keys" | rename ssh_user_details.username as "Username" | rename ssh_user_details.keys_current as "Active Keys" | rename ssh_user_details.keys_total as "All-Time Keys" | rename ssh_user_details.hosts_current as "Active Hosts" | rename ssh_user_details.hosts_total as "All-Time Hosts" | rename ssh_user_details.first_seen as "First Seen" | rename ssh_user_details.last_seen as "Last Seen"
